author: M. R.
text: Best honey cake in the area. Came for a birthday, leaving as a regular.

author: J. S.
text: Lovely pistachio roll. Wish you delivered.

author: A. P.
text: Cake was fine but I waited 25 minutes for one slice. Front of house could be faster.

author: D. N.
text: We've been ordering from HappyCake for our office birthdays for months. Never disappointed.
